name: yesid-dev
description: yesid.dev monorepo - apps/web (SvelteKit consumer) + apps/cms (Directus config). Workflow contract: AGENTS.md; long-form context lives in Notion.

scripts.build:op: op run --env-file=.env -- bun run --cwd apps/cms export:fallbacks && EXPORT_FALLBACKS_SKIP=1 turbo run build
scripts.cms:sync:diff:op: op run --env-file=.env -- bun run --cwd apps/cms sync:diff
scripts.cms:sync:push:op: op run --env-file=.env -- bun run --cwd apps/cms sync:push
scripts.cms:setup:site-labels:op: op run --env-file=apps/cms/.env -- bun run --cwd apps/cms setup:site-labels
scripts.ci:tokens: bun run tokens:build && git diff --exit-code apps/web/src/lib/styles/tokens.css apps/web/src/app.css apps/web/src/lib/motion/tokens.ts DESIGN.md
